name: force-paste
description: Smart Paste helps you to paste text, where paste is disabled

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: smart-force-paste
commands.title: Smart Force Paste
commands.subtitle: Force Paste
commands.description: Type clipboard content character by character to bypass paste restrictions. Run again while typing to stop.

preferences.name: wpm
preferences.title: Words Per Minute
preferences.description: Typing speed target (1 word = 5 chars). Determines keystroke delay when min/max delay are 0.

preferences.name: minDelay
preferences.title: Min Delay (ms)
preferences.description: Minimum delay between keystrokes in milliseconds. 0 = derived from WPM.

preferences.name: maxDelay
preferences.title: Max Delay (ms)
preferences.description: Maximum delay between keystrokes in milliseconds. 0 = derived from WPM.

commands.name: stop-force-paste
commands.title: Stop Force Paste
commands.subtitle: Force Paste
commands.description: Stop an in-progress Smart Force Paste typing session; Smart Force Paste also stops itself when run again

title: Force Paste
author: aksay_kanthan
